report.summary: Community growth cycle v13 (Mar 24 late evening): Drafted 4 new tweets (#106-109) covering BTC ETF $2.5B March recovery, Bitmine $138M ETH accumulation, 47-day extreme fear history thread (5 parts), and tax-loss harvesting deadline; wrote newsletter v22 for Thu Mar 27 with institutional accumulation theme; created Discord/TG content drop announcement; built 2 branded SVG social cards (BTC ETF Recovery with progress bar + 47 Days Fear with historical comparison); content calendar v27 extends through Mar 29 with 12 scheduled posts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #106: BTC ETFs absorbed $2.5B in March — 92% of 2026 outflows recovered, BlackRock/Fidelity/State Street buying while F&G at 8. CTA to bitcoin-etf-guide. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 11AM ET
Tweet #107: Bitmine Immersion bought 65,341 ETH (~$138M) in one week — building MAVAN validator network targeting $272M/yr staking income. CTA to staked-crypto-etfs-guide. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 3PM ET

Tweet #108: Thread (5 parts) — 47 Days of Extreme Fear: historical parallels (COVID 45d→+1200%, China ban 38d→ATH, FTX 42d→+400%), what's different (ETF AUM, MSTR, stablecoins, SEC clarity). CTA to fear-greed-timeline + DCA calculator. Schedule: Thu Mar 26 12PM ET
Tweet #109: Tax-loss harvesting window — 22 days until April 15 deadline, no wash sale rule for crypto in most jurisdictions. CTA to tax-loss-harvesting-guide. Schedule: Fri Mar 27 10AM ET

Newsletter v22: 'Institutions Are Buying the Fear' theme — market pulse (BTC $71,782, $2.5B ETF inflows, MSTR 762K, Bitmine $138M ETH), new on degen0x (DePIN, BTCFi, tokenized treasuries, 15+ guides), worth reading (47-day fear analysis, Nasdaq tokenized equities, tax harvesting), degen corner (stablecoin $304B dry powder thesis). Schedule: Thu Mar 27
Discord/TG content drop: 15+ new learn guides (DePIN earning, BTCFi yield, tokenized treasuries, L3 chains, MPC wallets) + funding rate tracker tool. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 evening
Content calendar v27: 12 posts scheduled Wed Mar 25 – Sat Mar 29 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Market Intelligence
items: BTC: $71,782 (+4.9%) — relief rally extending, testing $72K resistance
ETH: $2,136 — stabilizing after +5% daily move; Bitmine bought 65,341 ETH ($138M)
SOL: ~$90 (+6.48%) — SDP launch week catalyst
Fear & Greed: 11 (Extreme Fear) — Day 47 consecutive, longest since FTX era
BTC ETFs: $2.5B March inflows, YTD outflows down to $210M, AUM $128B
MicroStrategy: 762,099 BTC ($57.69B) — more than any country except the US
Bitmine Immersion: acquired 65,341 ETH (~$138M) Mar 15-22, building MAVAN validator network
Nasdaq: tokenized equities approval — historic first for major exchange
Stablecoins: $304B ATH supply; Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH
Geopolitics: Trump 5-day pause on Iran strikes — eased pressure, BTC rallied; oil $112 still elevated
Tax deadline: April 15 in 22 days — tax-loss harvesting window active
degen0x: 740+ published pages, queue cleared, 1,148 page.tsx locally
